scripts.build: npm run build -w @azilseniori/database && npm run build -w @azilseniori/api && npm run build -w @azilseniori/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @azilseniori/web && npm run lint -w @azilseniori/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @azilseniori/web && npm run typecheck -w @azilseniori/api && npm run typecheck -w @azilseniori/database
